channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Leslie Grossman and Sascha Penn Are Married! Inside Their Summer Elopement and Winter Wedding Party (Exclusive)
item.description: Ryan Murphy planned an intimate New Year's Eve dinner to celebrate the couple's marriage

item.title: Trisha Yearwood’s Under-the-Radar Modern Farmhouse Collection Is Up to 61% Off at Wayfair’s Presidents Day Sale
item.description: Her charming pieces are selling fast

item.title: Jennifer Love Hewitt Remembers 'Best Friend' Betty White, Including the Icon's One 'Negative' Trait (Exclusive)
item.description: Hewitt and White became friends after costarring in the 2011 Hallmark movie 'The Lost Valentine'

item.title: “Love Is Blind”'s Zack and Bliss Are Expecting Baby No. 2 (Exclusive)
item.description: The proud parents welcomed their first baby, daughter Galileo, in April 2024

item.title: Who Has Jacob Elordi Dated? Inside the “Wuthering Heights” Star's Love Life
item.description: Jacob Elordi and Olivia Jade Giannulli broke up in August 2025 but have since sparked reconciliation rumors

item.title: SWAT Makes Its Move in the Nancy Guthrie Kidnapping -- The Latest
item.description: The swat operation Friday night -- leading to the detention of a driver in the Tucson area and the search of a home -- appears to be something other t...

item.title: White House Celebrates Valentine's Day with Cards Featuring Nicolás Maduro, Greenland
item.description: Move aside, Melania -- Donald Trump's White House is celebrating Valentine's Day with some cheeky cards that applaud the administration's accomplishme...

item.title: Cardi B Falls on Stage During 'Little Miss Drama' Tour
item.description: The "B" in Cardi B might stand for "bruise" after she took a serious tumble off a chair during her "Little Miss Drama" tour in Las Vegas Friday night....

item.title: 'Laguna Beach' Star Lauren Conrad Celebrates 40th Birthday with HS-Themed Bash
item.description: Lauren Conrad turned the big 4-0 earlier this month -- but her birthday bash brought her all the way back to her high school days on 'Laguna Beach.' T...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie Case: First Photo of Man Detained During Traffic Stop
item.description: Police reportedly detained at least 3 people in connection with the Nancy Guthrie kidnapping ... and now we're seeing the first image of a man in hand...
